title: Health check is static and does not verify DB connectivity
evidence: app.go:203 healthCheck returns {"status":"ok"} unconditionally without pinging the SQLite handle
suggestion: Ping db in /health so the endpoint reflects real service health

title: GET /books returns the full collection with no pagination
evidence: app.go:79 listBooks selects all rows; no ?limit/?offset support
suggestion: Add limit/offset params if large collections are expected (beyond current spec)

title: SQLite path is hardcoded to ./books.db
evidence: app.go:27 sql.Open("sqlite3", "./books.db") — not configurable via env/flag
suggestion: Allow the DB path to be set via env var for deployment flexibility
